headline: Microsoft Corporation (MSFT)’s Expanding Role in Global Security
summary: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of the debt free halal stocks to buy. On March 11, EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) announced it has joined the Microsoft Intelligent Security Association (MISA). MISA is a group of software and security companies that work closely with Microsoft Security to help customers fight growing cyber threats. By joining MISA, EPAM […]
